name: Lemon Pudding Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Butter, softened at room temperature
2 cups Light Cream at Room Temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter well in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add 3/4 cup sugar in two additions, beating one minute after each portion is added.
3. Blend in the egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Beat in the lemon juice and rind; then beat in flour and cream.
5. Beat the egg whites on moderately high speed in a small deep bowl until frothy.
6. Add cream of tartar; continue beating until soft peaks form.
7. Add the remaining 1/4 cup sugar; beat until firm but moist peaks form.
8. Stir in a small spoonful of the egg whites into the lemon mixture, then fold in the remaining egg whites.
9. Gently pour the filling into the baked pie shell.
10. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees and continue baking about 25 minutes or until the top is well risen and firm to the touch.
11. Transfer to a cooling rack. Cool completely; then refrigerate 6 hours before serving.
